articles.title: Microsoft Quarterly Cloud Revenue Beats Expectations
articles.summary: Microsoft's Azure and cloud segment grew faster than analysts expected, lifting overall quarterly results above consensus.

articles.title: Microsoft Announces Acquisition of AI Startup
articles.summary: Microsoft agreed to acquire a smaller AI infrastructure startup to bolster its cloud and enterprise AI offerings, terms undisclosed.

articles.title: Analyst Downgrades Microsoft on Valuation Concerns
articles.summary: An analyst moved to a neutral rating on Microsoft, citing a stretched valuation after the stock's recent run-up.

articles.title: Microsoft Declares Increased Quarterly Dividend
articles.summary: Microsoft's board approved a dividend increase, marking another consecutive year of payout growth.

articles.title: Microsoft Executive Steps Down
articles.summary: A senior Microsoft executive announced plans to leave the company, with an internal successor named on an interim basis.

articles.title: Microsoft Launches New AI-Powered Product Suite
articles.summary: Microsoft rolled out a new suite of AI-integrated productivity tools aimed at enterprise customers.
